title: Fissile Magic
description: Arcane spell impacts have {trigger_chance} chance, to cause a small explosion, dealing {damage} damage.

title: Evocation Radiance
description: Arcane spell impacts have {trigger_chance} chance, to heal the you for {heal}.

title: Arcane Trap
description: Upon rolling, you leave behind an Arcane Trap, lasting {cloud_duration} sec, dealing {damage} damage to entering enemies.

title: Phase Shift
description: Upon rolling, you become invulnerable for {effect_duration} sec.

title: Conjured Missile
description: Arcane Missile shoots {extra_launch} additional missile per batch.

title: Crippling Barrage
description: Arcane Missiles apply slowness, reducing movement speed by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.

title: Spell Riposte
description: Upon taking damage, an Arcane Bolt is launched at the attacker, dealing {damage} damage.

title: Arcane Ward
description: Arcane spells have {trigger_chance} chance, to grant you Arcane Ward, absorbing high amount of damage, lasting {effect_duration} sec.

title: Beam Exposure
description: Arcane Beam applies Arcane Exposure increasing Arcane damage taken by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.

title: Beam Propulsion
description: Arcane Beam hits increase your speed and jump strength by {bonus} for {effect_duration} sec, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times.

title: Presence of Mind
description: Blink turns your next spell cast instant, within the next {stash_duration} sec.

title: Purge
description: Blink attempts to remove 2 negative effects from you entirely.

title: Rhythm
description: Hitting Marked target increasing ranged attack speed by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.

title: Concussive Shot
description: Arrows have {trigger_chance} chance, to stun the target for {effect_duration} sec.

title: Momentum
description: Rolling grants you an additional stack of Rhythm.

title: Tactical Maneuver
description: Rolling has {trigger_chance} chance to increase your roll recharge speed by {bonus}, for {effect_duration} sec.

title: Improved Hunter's Mark
description: Power Shot applies {stash_amplifier_add} additional Hunter's Mark stack.

title: Nature's Grasp
description: Entangling Roots has {impact_chance} chance to immobilize the target for {effect_duration} sec.

title: Supercharge
description: Arrow hits have {trigger_chance_1} chance to Supercharge your next shot within {stash_duration} sec, taking longer to pull but dealing {bonus} damage with strong knockback.

title: Deflection
description: Upon taking damage below {threshold} health you gain Deflection effect, parrying the next {effect_amplifier} incoming melee attack, lasting {effect_duration} sec.

title: Extensive Barrage
description: Barrage fires {extra_launch} extra arrow.

title: Blood Barrage
description: Barrage arrow hits heal you by {heal}.

title: Conjured Arrow
description: Magic Arrow has {trigger_chance} chance to reset its own cooldown.

title: Magic Punch
description: Magic Arrow deals extra {knockback_multiply_base} knockback.

title: Scorching Flames
description: Fire spell impacts have {trigger_chance} chance to apply Fire Vulnerability. Increasing damage taken from fire spells by {bonus}, stacking up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} sec.

title: Hot Impact
description: Fire spell impacts have {trigger_chance} chance to stun the target for {effect_duration} sec.

title: Flame Trap
description: Upon rolling, you leave behind a Flame Trap, lasting {cloud_duration} sec, dealing {damage} damage and applying Fire Vulnerability to entering enemies.

title: Blazing Speed
description: Upon rolling, you have {trigger_chance} chance to gain {bonus} movement speed for {effect_duration} sec.

title: Explosive Breath
description: Fire Breath hits have {trigger_chance} chance to explode a target, dealing {damage} damage to nearby enemies.

title: Flame Throwing
description: Increased the range of Fire Breath by {range_add}.

title: Eruption
description: Taking damage has {trigger_chance} chance to cause a strong explosion, dealing {damage} damage to nearby enemies.

description: Upon taking damage below {threshold} health you gain Last Stand effect, increasing your size, ranged haste & decreasing incoming damage for {effect_duration} sec.

title: Strong Water Whip
description: Water Whip deals {knockback_multiply_base} more knockback.

title: Bubble Pop
description: Bubble Beam's healing & damage is increased by by {power_multiplier}.

title: Holy Water Spring
description: Springwater removes {effect_amplifier} negative effect from allies and deals extra {damage} damage to undead.

title: Hydro Boost
description: Hydro Beam increases the movement speed of allies by {bonus} for {effect_duration} seconds.

title: Hydration
description: Healing spells applies Hydration regenerating health for {effect_duration} sec.

title: Soothing Mist
description: {trigger_chance} chance upon rolling to leave Soothing Mist behind for {cloud_duration} sec, cleansing negative conditions.

title: Calming Flow
description: Water Spell Hits and heals have {trigger_chance_1} chance to enter in a calming flow, reducing active water spell cooldowns while casting spells for a {stash_duration} sec.

title: Splish Splash
description: Water Whip deals {damage} damage around the target.

title: Persistant Bubbles
description: Bubble Beam hits have {trigger_chance} to decrease the movement- & attackspeed by {bonus} for {effect_duration} seconds.

title: Bubbling Spring
description: Springwater leaves a bubbling area behind, dealing {damage} damage to enemies, for {cloud_duration} sec.

title: High Water Pressure
description: Hydro Beam has {trigger_chance} chance to stun the target.

title: Second Wave
description: Water Spells have {trigger_chance} to knock the target back.

title: Splashdown
description: While rolling, you knockback nearby enemies.

title: Torrent
description: Falling under {threshold} health, increases water spell power for {bonus2} and spell crit chance & spell haste for {bonus} for {effect_duration} sec.
